description: TerminationEvent entity template — Represents the reason a dev-loop session ended and the conditions that triggered termination
_comment_event_id: Unique termination event identifier (term-{timestamp}-{reason}). Auto-generated on termination.
_comment_session_id: Parent DevLoopSession reference. Links this event to session state.
_comment_reason: Why the session ended (FR-022). MUST match the highest-priority triggered condition.
_comment_iteration: Iteration at which termination occurred. MUST match session's final iteration_count.
_comment_final_grade: Composite quality grade at termination. MUST match last entry in DevLoopSession.quality_grades[].
_comment_checkpoint_saved: Whether session state was persisted for --resume. MUST be true for user_interrupt terminations (FR-028).

trigger_conditions._comment: Boolean flags for each termination layer (FR-022). Evaluated in priority order. Exactly one MUST be true.
trigger_conditions._trigger_rule: Quality improvement < convergence_delta for convergence_window consecutive iterations (FR-023)
trigger_conditions._example_trigger: grades=[0.845, 0.846, 0.847], delta=0.001, window=3 => improvements all < 0.002 => TRUE
trigger_conditions._trigger_rule: Same error or test failure recurs for 3+ consecutive iterations OR code state oscillation detected (FR-026)
trigger_conditions._example_trigger: iterations [5,6,7,8] all fail with 'TypeError: undefined property' => TRUE
trigger_conditions._trigger_rule: User sends interrupt signal (Ctrl+C, SIGINT) or .interrupt file detected (FR-028)

details._comment: Context-specific termination details. Structure varies by reason.
details._comment_details: For success termination: shows threshold met and resource efficiency

_termination_priority._comment: Priority order for termination evaluation (FR-022). First match wins.

convergence_detected: Get last N grades where N = session.config.convergence_window
Calculate improvements: [grade[i] - grade[i-1] for i in range(N)]
Return TRUE if all improvements below delta
budget_exhausted: Return TRUE if either limit exceeded
stuck_detected: Repeated error: Check if same error message appears in last 3+ iterations
Oscillation: Hash code state each iteration, detect if current hash matches any of last 5
No progress: Check if quality_grade unchanged for 5+ iterations
Return TRUE if any pattern detected
user_interrupted: Check for .interrupt file in session directory

_validation_rules: Exactly one of trigger_conditions[*] MUST be true
reason MUST match the highest-priority triggered condition
checkpoint_saved MUST be true for user_interrupt terminations
final_grade MUST match last entry in DevLoopSession.quality_grades[] (if quality_grades not empty)
iteration MUST equal parent session's iteration_count

details.stuck_pattern: TypeError: Cannot read property 'id' of undefined
